attachments.fallback: Reliable Method to Convert vCard to CSV Files? - @christie (Christie charles)
attachments.text: The most reliable and easy way to convert vCard contacts to CSV files is using the <https://www.bitrecover.com/vcard/converter/|BitRecover vCard Converter>. It allows you to convert single or multiple VCF files into CSV in just a few clicks while keeping all contact details intact, including names, phone numbers, emails, and more. The user can convert single or multiple vCard contact files. This converter gives you different saving formats.
